## Description

What does this PR do? Give a brief summary of the change.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number) — if this addresses an existing issue.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe how you tested your changes (manual steps, automated tests, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the existing codebase
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] I confirm this contribution is my own work (or I have the right to submit it) and agree it will be licensed under the project's [PolyForm Noncommercial License](../LICENSE), per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add before/after screenshots for UI changes.

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know — open questions, tradeoffs, things you're unsure about.
